title: hieracium pholidotum
intro: Hieracium pholidotum, also known as Hawkweed, is a perennial plant species in the dandelion-like Hawkweed genus, characterized by its yellow flowers and jagged leaves. The medicinal properties of Hieracium pholidotum lie in its bitter compounds, which have been traditionally used to stimulate digestion and alleviate symptoms of indigestion, bloating, and other gastrointestinal issues. The health benefits of the plant include its ability to act as a mild laxative, reduce inflammation, and exhibit antimicrobial properties, making it a popular choice for treating various health conditions. Hieracium pholidotum can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusions for its medicinal properties, and its roots can be used in herbal remedies to support digestive health.
